blockingIssues.description: The Continue button only opens the difficulty selector when `completedDifficulties.length > 0`. A save whose persisted `difficulty` is `nightmare` or `hell` but has an empty or missing `completedDifficulties` array loads directly via `loadGame(save)`, which bypasses difficulty re-selection and breaks the requirement that difficulty persist across save/load for such saves.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the MenuScene difficulty-selector persistence caveat for saves whose `difficulty` is set but whose `completedDifficulties` array is empty or missing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document Phaser canvas interaction limits and the need to use keyboard shortcuts or coordinate-based clicks when browser-validating in-game UI.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The gem-socketing-ui worker transcript shows repeated failed browser interaction attempts against the canvas UI before ending the feature, while mission guidance already notes the coordinate-click caveat.

rejectedObservations.observation: The immediate autosave rule for progression unlocks should be added again as new library guidance.
